channel.title: Banking Fluency for Bitcoin-Age Operators
channel.itunes:author: FRIDAY
channel.description: A structured daily course for understanding banks, credit unions, regulation, payments, lending, custody, and the institutional context for Bitcoin-age financial infrastructure.
channel.itunes:summary: A structured daily course for understanding banks, credit unions, regulation, payments, lending, custody, and the institutional context for Bitcoin-age financial infrastructure.

item.title: Day 015: Why Banking And Credit Unions Are Regulated
item.description: Banking Fluency Day 015: Why Banking And Credit Unions Are Regulated. A regulated-financial-institution fluency lesson for Bitcoin-age operators.
item.itunes:summary: Banking Fluency Day 015: Why Banking And Credit Unions Are Regulated. A regulated-financial-institution fluency lesson for Bitcoin-age operators.

item.title: Day 014: Institutional Forms Ii Trusts Fintechs And Vendors

item.itunes:summary: Banking Fluency Day 014: Institutional Forms Ii Trusts Fintechs And Vendors. A regulated-financial-institution fluency lesson for Bitcoin-age operators.

item.title: Day 013: Institutional Forms I Banks And Credit Unions

item.itunes:summary: Banking Fluency Day 013: Institutional Forms I Banks And Credit Unions. A regulated-financial-institution fluency lesson for Bitcoin-age operators.
